docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF IAN DEROUIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISAMARIE INESI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEROURIN, IAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INESI, LISAMARIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED DEFENDANT ON 03/21/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED FEB-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INESI, LISAMARIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,847.86 FILED BY DEROURIN, IAN AS TO DEFENDANT INESI, LISAMARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DEROURIN, IAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2018 - JUDGMENT.
